top_signals.title: US spot Bitcoin ETFs set to hit $2 trillion cumulative trading volume milestone amid mounting outflows
top_signals.summary: BlackRock's IBIT dominates spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds by trading volume, with a current 73.7% market share.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
